column1: TailorSend — CASH FLOW & BALANCE (NVC structure · Years 1–5 · $25K ask)
Ask $25K is the Y1 capital bridge (TalentHub NVC grant analogue).
Y1 product revenue + monthly path unchanged (~$336 MRR EOY); ending cash rises with the ask.
Y2 founder salary $0 cash (sweat equity) while validating campus GTM.
First staff hire Year 5 only after revenue confirmed.
Tax = 25% of pre-tax profit (Sources − Uses before tax line).
